summary: This role is a poor fit because it requires heavy mathematical calculations and analytical reasoning, areas that conflict with your core strengths in protocol-driven work. The high-stakes environment—marked by regulatory liability and time-sensitive isotopes—creates a high-stress atmosphere that undermines your goal of personal wellbeing. Additionally, the frequent requirement for unpredictable on-call shifts and emotional labor in oncology settings makes this career path unsustainable given your preference for predictable hours and low-stress environments.
